creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
I would go with an issue using lldb.

Do you have an llvm pkg installed? Check that it matches the base system version.

Try `where lldb` is there a /usr/local/bin/lldb and /usr/bin/lldb?

does `lldb --version` match `clang --version`?

Being c++ I wonder if the pkg build is using the same versions as you have installed? You could try building godot from ports so it links with the libs you have in place.
